Hearth & Vine Restaurant Group

Family-owned since 2003. Three locations across the Twin Cities.

Now Hiring

Executive Chef — Hearth Downtown

  • Location: Minneapolis, MN
  • Type: Full-time
  • Salary: $75,000 – $90,000/year + bonus

Lead our flagship kitchen. You'll develop seasonal menus using locally sourced ingredients, manage a team of 12, and uphold our commitment to sustainability.

Requires 7+ years of professional kitchen experience and ServSafe certification.

Email Your Resume

Front-of-House Manager — Vine St. Paul

  • Location: St. Paul, MN
  • Type: Full-time

Oversee daily service operations at our St. Paul location. Manage a team of 8 servers, handle reservations, and ensure every guest has an exceptional experience.

Email Your Resume

Line Cook — All Locations

  • Location: Minneapolis or St. Paul, MN
  • Type: Full-time or Part-time
  • Pay: $18–$24/hour depending on experience

Prep, cook, and plate dishes in a fast-paced environment. We'll train the right person — passion for food matters more than years of experience.

Email Your Resume

Hearth & Vine is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, or orientation.
